---
title: Rural business entry rates declined across all regions since 1980
description: Line chart showing rural business entry rate trends by Census region
  since 1980.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-rural-region-entry-change-since-1980-lc/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Entrepreneurship
  - Rural Development
  - Geography
tags:
  - BDS
  - Business Entry
  - Entrepreneurship
  - Rural
  - Regional
  - Long-term Trends
  - Line Chart
image: 4.1_rural_region_entry_change_since_1980_lc.svg
chart:
  title: Rural business entry rates declined across all regions since 1980
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  dataSource: U.S. Census Bureau, Business Dynamics Statistics
  sourceUrl: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/bds.html
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - census-bds
usesPackages:
  - cori-data-bds
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks the long-term decline in rural business entry rates across all Census regions since 1980, revealing a secular decline in entrepreneurship.](./4.1_rural_region_entry_change_since_1980_lc.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks the long-term decline in rural business entry rates across all Census regions since 1980, revealing a secular decline in entrepreneurship.

## Key Findings

- Business entry rates have declined in all rural regions since 1980
- The decline accelerated after 2000
- Regional differences in entry rates have narrowed over time

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/biz_entry_region_lc.R` in the producing project.
